query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE public_status = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL) as public_docs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE public_status = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL) as pending_docs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stories WHERE public_status = 'public' AND deleted_at IS NULL) as public_stories,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stories WHERE public_status = 'pending_review' AND deleted_at IS NULL) as pending_stories,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM actors WHERE public_status = 1) as actors,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM timeline_events WHERE public_status = 1) as timeline_events,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public_records_requests WHERE public_status = 1) as public_prrs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_requests) as review_requests,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as users;
